extract: Fire Punch (Japanese: ほのおのパンチ Flame Punch) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM48 in Generation II. TM31 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TM03 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM067 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM029 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Ice Punch and Thunder Punch, having similar names and effects.
